calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend Judgment To Correct The Name Of The Judgment Debtors
Off Calendar Dec-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF THE SAN FRANCISCO GROVE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION'S Motion to Amend Judgment To Correct The Name Of The Judgment Debtor (SOFYA RUBINSHTEYN) is Granted. The Plaintiff requests that the name of the judgment creditor be corrected to read "THE SAN FRANCISCO GROVE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/ehg
